text:
(Rev. 265, Issued: 01-10-20, Effective: 01-01-20, Implementation: 02-11-20) 

Observation and assessment of the patient's condition by a nurse are reasonable and 
necessary skilled services where there is a reasonable potential for change in a patient's 
condition that requires skilled nursing personnel to identify and evaluate the patient's 
need for possible modification of treatment or initiation of additional medical procedures 
until the patient's clinical condition and/or treatment
